Creatine Kinase 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a creatine kinase (CK) test? 
This test measures the amount of creatine kinase (CK) in a sample of your blood. CK is also called creatine phosphokinase (CPK).
CK is an enzyme. An enzyme is a protein that speeds up certain chemical reactions in your body. CK helps make energy. Most of the CK in your body is in your skeletal muscles. These are the muscles you use to move. You also ha
